description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CrossBuild that runs on push to master and tags matching v*, on pull requests to master, on workflow dispatch, and on release creation. Read repository contents and run a ubuntu-latest job with a cross-building strategy across multiple architectures. For each architecture, check out the code, install cross-tools, build the project with CMake and make, and test it with QEMU except for sparc64, m68k, and sh4.
